paper.title: GPT-4 API general availability and deprecation of older models in the Completions API
paper.abstract: GPT-3.5 Turbo, DALL·E and Whisper APIs are also generally available, and we are releasing a deprecation plan for older models of the Completions API, which will retire at the beginning of 2024.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
